dtsPropsFor.Breadcrumb:
items?: Array<{ label: React.ReactNode; href?: string }>;
  className?: string;
dtsPropsFor.BennyBubble:
children: React.ReactNode;   // bubble body; <strong> is styled (bold, navy)
timestamp?: string;          // renders 'Analysis last run on <timestamp>' subline
dtsPropsFor.Hero:
bucket?: 'motivation' | 'integrity' | 'habits' | 'skills';   // auto-derives icon/title/accent/accentBg from SECTIONS
initials?: string;            // colored square avatar (mutually exclusive with icon)
icon?: React.ReactNode;       // tinted icon block (mutually exclusive with initials)
title?: string;               // required (auto from bucket)
subtitle?: string;
score?: number;               // big number on right, rendered as "<score>/100"
delta?: number;               // ↑/↓ pts indicator; 0 → ±0 flat
accent?: string;              // icon stroke / avatar bg / score color
accentBg?: string;            // icon block background tint
action?: React.ReactNode;     // right-side slot (e.g. a Button)
dtsPropsFor.PrototypeNav: currentHref?: string;   // e.g. '/bs-prototypes/ris/' — selects + accent-tints that prototype; '' → 'Select prototype' empty state
dtsPropsFor.ActiveFilters:
filters: Array<{ key: string; label: React.ReactNode; onClear?: () => void }>;
onClearAll?: () => void;
dtsPropsFor.ChartLegend: items: Array<{ color: string; label: React.ReactNode; dashed?: boolean }>;
dtsPropsFor.StatCard:
value: React.ReactNode;       // number or string (e.g. '1,284', '88%')
unit?: React.ReactNode;       // small suffix after value (e.g. '/40')
label: React.ReactNode;
footer?: React.ReactNode;     // small caption (e.g. trend)
footerColor?: string;         // CSS color for the footer text
color?: string;               // accent color for the value (else inherits --rc-accent)
